Professor '''Charles {{Conjecture|Francis}} Xavier''' is a [[mutant]], the headmaster of [[Xavier's School for Gifted Youngsters]] and the leader of the [[X-Men]] known as '''Professor X'''.

==Biography==
''To be added''

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
*'''Mutant Physiology''': As a [[mutant]], Charles Xavier possesses unique DNA structure, different from [[humans]], which grants him superhuman abilities.

===Abilities===
''To be added''

==Equipment==
*'''[[Charles Xavier's Wheelchair|Wheelchair]]''': Due to his lower body paralysis, Charles Xavier uses a wheelchair to travel around.

===Allies===

**[[Cyclops|Scott Summers/Cyclops]]
*[[Magneto|Erik Lehnsherr/Magneto]] - Friend

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Professor X is the headmaster of [[Xavier's School for Gifted Youngsters]] and the founder of the [[X-Men]], a superhero team composed of [[mutants]], with the school being the place where he trains mutants so they can control their powers.
